markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review December performance and discuss content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**December Performance:** Sessions broke 4k, impressions spiked, and top-10 keywords grew from 4.4k to nearly 6k, signaling strong momentum into 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** ChatGPT alone drove more traffic than all other LLMs combined in November, underscoring its growing importance as a discovery channel.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - **SEO Strategy:** The plan is to close the gap to the \#1 Scrunch competitor by creating content for queries where Discern is absent, focusing on high-intent, bottom-funnel topics.
  - [**Conversion Focus:** A new strategy will use competitor comparison content and potential on-page tools (e.g., ROI calculators) to drive more demo bookings.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Topics

### December Performance Review

  - [**Sessions:** Broke 4k, a significant jump despite the holiday season.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [**Impressions & Clicks:** Spiked dramatically across the entire site, indicating a surge in user interest.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [**Keyword Growth:**](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Top 1:** Grew from 521 → 622.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Top 2-10:** Grew from 4.4k → nearly 6k.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** ChatGPT traffic in December exceeded all LLM traffic from November, highlighting its growing impact.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

### SEO Strategy: Closing the Scrunch Gap

  - **Goal:** Close the gap to the \#1 competitor on Scrunch, where Discern is currently \#3.
  - [**Plan:** Create or refresh content for queries where competitors rank but Discern does not.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [**Focus:** Prioritize bottom-funnel, listicle-style content to capture high-intent users.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [**Progress:**](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [Top positions captured increased.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [Sentiment remains highly positive.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [Citations grew from 1% → 3%.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

### Content Strategy: Driving Conversions

  - [**Objective:** Increase demo bookings from content.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Primary Tactic:** Create competitor comparison content.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [**Rationale:** High-intent users making a purchase decision.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [**Format:** Blog posts or dedicated static landing pages ("Competitor vs. Discern").](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [**Secondary Tactic:** Explore on-page tools.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Engage users and provide direct value.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**Examples:** ROI calculator (similar to TransferWise's exchange rate calculator).](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### Content Production & Accuracy

  - [**Annual Report Refreshes:** Delivered ahead of schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [**Comparative Content:** On track for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [**Accuracy Request:** GrowthX needs specific Discern vertical materials to ensure content is precise, not generic.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [**Action:** Vivek will clarify the request for Mike.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [Clarify the request for Discern vertical materials and send to Mike by Jan 9.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
      - [Evaluate and recommend specific on-page tools for content conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [Begin creating competitor comparison content (blogs or landing pages).](https://fathom.video/share/CXkCKy6iwczJEbRs4kCQVKwtNw5tauL_?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
